name: The Siege of Brimir
short_description: Play as an alien with super powers in frenetic battles against the army, destroy buildings, smash, fly and improve your character in order to annihilate humanity. They will try to stop you with their soldiers, F15, Giant mechas, warships or tanks but it is going to be useless against your power.
detailed_description:
Fight against all humanity in this videogame where you are the villain. You are an alien with superpowers sent to conquer the planet.

THE CONQUEST BEGINS

From your mothership in Earth’s orbit, launch a planetary campaign to conquer humanity. Choose different locations across the world and subjugate each region to your will. Every mission features cinematic sequences and lore that reveal humanity’s final days as your invasion unfolds.

Deploy mining drills deep beneath Earth’s crust and begin draining the planet’s resources — but stay alert. Human militaries will relentlessly attack your extraction sites. Defend your miners, crush resistance forces, and ensure your operation continues at all costs.

ARENA MODE

Step into fast, action-packed combat scenarios built for pure chaos and destruction. The Arena is a focused battleground where you can test your powers, experiment with new ability combinations, and face off against escalating waves of enemies.

Arena Mode is your playground — a place to master your alien powers, push the limits of destruction, and prove that no military force on Earth can stand against you.

EVOLVE YOUR SUPERPOWERS

Unlock and upgrade a wide variety of devastating abilities. Combine powers to create maximum destruction: vaporize armies, demolish cities, and send the world into panic. Shape your alien into the ultimate force of domination.

But humanity won’t fall easily. Their technology evolves after every encounter… and worse, their “superheroes” will rise to challenge you. They believe they can stop you. They think they’re a match for your power.

They are wrong.
They will perish — just like the rest of their planet.

supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain
*languages with full audio support
